_note: M4a/F28 bypass-side self-negative. A bypass registry MISSING the claude-code/stop record. Fed via --bypass-known against the LIVE claude-code manifest (which declares stop) -> M4a 'no_record'. Proves the 4 live claude-code records are load-bearing (non-vacuity).

records.citation: multi-edit bypass per RFC-008 §Per-harness capability declarations
